title: Add __repr__ to TaskResult dataclass
description: Adds a human-readable __repr__ to the TaskResult dataclass so that debug logging and REPL inspection shows meaningful output instead of the default representation.
diff:
diff --git a/models/task_result.py b/models/task_result.py
index 3d4e5f6..a7b8c9d 100644
--- a/models/task_result.py
+++ b/models/task_result.py
@@ -14,3 +14,7 @@ class TaskResult:
     status: str
     duration_ms: int
     error: str | None = None
+
+    def __repr__(self) -> str:
+        err = f", error={self.error!r}" if self.error else ""
+        return f"TaskResult(task_id={self.task_id!r}, status={self.status!r}, duration={self.duration_ms}ms{err})"
author: zach
